Nepal Hiphop Records Presents the official music video of Kali Kali by ST MAN featuring Yung 22 & Big Norzza.
Kali Kali is a fusion of a Hindi chorus, Nepali folk melodies, and new school rap.


Audio Credits :

snippet.title: [Hindi] BGIS 2026 | GRAND FINALS | Day 3 #BGMILIVE #BGIS
snippet.description:
The GRAND FINALS of BGIS 2026 are here.

No more second chances. No more fallback stages.
This is where the trophy is decided.

After months of competition, the final teams stand ready to battle for the championship title and the ultimate prize. Every drop, every rotation, every fight now carries legacy weight.

One stage. One champion.

Watch the GRAND FINALS live and witness the conclusion of BGIS 2026.

it.title: Trailer ufficiale dell'arco di Elbaf | 5 aprile 2026 | ONE PIECE
it.description:
La trasmissione dell'anime ONE PIECE riprender√† in Giappone con la ciurma di Cappello di Paglia in rotta verso Elbaph!

5 aprile 2026, 23:15 (JST)

‚ô™ SIGLA DI APERTURA "Luminous" di AiNA THE END

‚óÜ Sinossi
Dopo una fuga rocambolesca da Egghead dell'Isola del Futuro, la ciurma di Cappello di Paglia si dirige verso una destinazione leggendaria. Insieme ai potenti Pirati Guerrieri Giganti, raggiungono finalmente Elbaph, la tanto attesa Terra dei Giganti.

Nuovi incontri con i Giganti e riunioni a lungo sperate si susseguono. Un nuovo, colossale capitolo ha inizio mentre la ciurma si imbarca in un'avventura senza precedenti, alla ricerca del tesoro supremo, il "ONE PIECE!"


ūüĎČISCRIVITI al nostro canale per ALTRO: @OnePieceOfficialENG

#ONEPIECE #Elbaph #Trailer #Anime #Luffy #Loki #cowcast #onepieceanime

Setelah melarikan diri dengan berani dari Pulau Masa Depan Egghead, Kru Topi Jerami menetapkan tujuan mereka menuju destinasi legendaris. Bergabung dengan Bajak Laut Prajurit Raksasa yang perkasa, mereka akhirnya mencapai Elbaph, Tanah Para Raksasa yang telah lama ditunggu-tunggu.

Dhurandhar The Revenge introduces Jaskirat Singh Rangi, tracing the chain of events that compel him to become Hamza Ali Mazari, and follows his rise as he operates deep inside Pakistan. The film is set to return this time in Hindi, Telugu, Tamil, Kannada and Malayalam.

19 March 2026
In Cinemas Worldwide
A Jio Studios Release

snippet.title: Sheesha (Official Music Video) | Mitta Ror ft. Swara Verma | Sorab Bedi | Niharika Tiwari
snippet.description:
The internet has spoken and we have listened. The real ‚Äúowners of the song‚ÄĚ have all assembled together! Watch Sorab Bedi and Niharika Tiwari join Mitta Ror for the Official Music Video of the viral hit song Sheesha.

Audio Credits:
Performed by Mitta Ror, Swara Verma
Written and Composed by Mitta Ror
Music Production by Yeah Ishwar

Video Credits:
Starring Sorab Bedi, Niharika Tiwari & Mitta Ror
Director - Teji Sandhu

Assistant DOP @stablefilms

Lyrics:

Teri Aage Peechhe Laage
Sun Daura Chhori Ka
Rang Tere Gela Match Hove
Gora Chhori Ka
Jo Rakhega Bacha Ke
Duniya Ki Nazra Te
Tere Kar Deyun Hawaale
Kala Dora Chhori Ka
Jib Te Re Pakda
yo Hath Tanne Mera
Thodi Thodi Main To
Ghabrandi Phiru Su

Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Tere Paida Mein ye Paid
Meri Jaan Laag Gi
Teri Pasand Ke Suit
Main Siman Laag Gi
Oh Din Dholi Mein
Tu Le Gaya Meri Jaan Kadh Ke
Pyaar Aale Gaane Main To
Gaan Laagi
Ho Chadheya Isa Pyaar Aala
Bhoot Mere Pe
Teri Photo Wallpaper Pe
Landi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Aakhya Me Aankh Manne Ghali Jo Beran
Teri Jhuk Gayi Thi Aankh
Sharma Ke Ne Beran
Gora Gora Chaam Tera
Kaale Kaale Baal Tere
Doob Gaya Main Billi Billi
Aankhya Mein Bairan
Teri Hansi Ke Hansi
Jama Zeher Chhori Re
Is Chhore Ke Dil Pe
Dhave Keher Chhori Re
Kade Rolya Mein
Pair bhi na Tekya Manne
Tere Paache Paale Baithe
Ghane Bair Chhori Re
Tu Fursat Te Ghadi
I Think Meri Jaan
Hoth Tere Laal
Gaal Pink Meri Jaan
Paida Pe Paid
Tu Mila ke Chaliye
Teri Gel Deun Gaane
Main Sync Meri Jaan

ho Aankhya Aalya Maarya
Tanne Teer Chhore Re
Mere Dil Ne yu Gaya
Jama Cheer Chhore Re
ho Teri Dhan Daulat Pe
Manne Kuch Konya Lena
Manne Dil Ka Tu Laage
Se Ameer Chhore Re
Teri Meri Jodi Ke Re
Laage Na Nazar
Main To Mandira Mein
Dive Makha Landi Phiru Su
Main To Dekh Dekh Sheesha
Sharmandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Sharmandi Phiru Su

Jitne Tere Pichhe Bhatak Rahe Hai
Laa Ke Chhati Se Keh De Na I Love You
Chhore Tere Ke Saans Atak Rahe Hai

#PhirSe

Lyrics:
Jo tu na tha, karte the hum baatein teri With memories
All my lives are clouded by your memories
How do I know?

I started to sigh again.
I thought the fuss was over, but my heart didn't agree.
I started to sigh again.
I thought the fuss was over, but my heart didn't agree.
I started to sigh again.
I thought the fuss was over, but my heart didn't agree.
I started to sigh again.
I thought the fuss was over, but my heart didn't agree.

Then‚ÄĒ

The one who tormented me to death in my loneliness

There was no one else, it was the shadow of your memories

There was no one else to accompany me on walks except you

When you I was alone, confined in my arms.
Never thought I would think of you like this.
Just like this, you would be the first question I would have.
Who knows how?

I started crying again.
I thought the fun was over, but my heart wouldn't accept it.
I started crying again.
I thought the fun was over, but my heart wouldn't accept it.
I started crying again.
I thought the fun was over, but my heart wouldn't accept it.
I started crying again.
I thought the fun was over, but my heart wouldn't accept it.
Again‚ÄĒ

I started crying again.
I thought the fun was over, but my heart wouldn't accept it.
I started crying again. The mood is over, but the heart still refuses to accept it.

snippet.description:
Dive into the full depth of emotions with lyrics that bring every feeling to life.

ūüĎČ Subscribe to Saregama Music: https://bit.ly/3FkAS0W

Jio Studios Presents
A B62 Studios Production

An Aditya Dhar Film
DHURANDHAR

Written, Directed and Produced by: Aditya Dhar
Produced by: Jyoti Deshpande
Produced by: Lokesh Dhar

Cast: Ranveer Singh, Sanjay Dutt, Akshaye Khanna, R. Madhavan, Arjun Rampal, Sara Arjun

A Shashwat Sachdev Musical

Composed, Produced and arranged by Shashwat Sachdev 
Singer: Arijit Singh, Armaan Khan 
Lyrics: Irshad Kamil
Music Supervisor: Adarsh Vishwakarma
Music producers: Sayantan Guha, Yash Singh
Bassist: Mohini Dey 
Tabla: Fateh Mohammed Sulemani
Sarangi: Momin Khan 
Backing vocals: Nikitha Venkatesh, Divya S Iyer, Shudi Ramani, Srishhti Bhitrikothiy

Mixed and mastered by: Akash Shravan

Lyrics:
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Tu agar meri ye ujaale tere 
Tu agar meri dil hawaale tere 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Laakhon farishton ki hai tu jaan 
Wo poochte hain rehti kahan 
Meri baahon mein rehti unko bataa 
Palke jhapakta hai aasma 
Usne bhi tujhsa dekha kahan 
Hai raunakein wahan tu hai jahan 
Meri baahon mein rehna yehi hai dua 
Tu agar meri hai fasaana tera 
Tu agar meri toh zamaana tera 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Tera hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Ma Re 
Ni Sa Ga Sa Ga Ma Pa Ga Re Sa 
Teri mohabbat mein jalna bhi hai 
Aur tujhse bachke hi chalna bhi hai 
Kuch rang apna badalna bhi hai 
Maine dhalna tere rang mein hai sadaa 
Tu chaand hai ik dhadakta hua 
Chori se mujhko hi takta hua 
Seene se lagke chamakta hua 
Meri jannat ka rasta 
Tu hi toh hua 
Tu agar meri ye hawaayein teri 
Tu agar meri saari raahein teri 
Tu agar meri main hoon tera 
Betaab sa mohabbbat ka tu inqalab hai 
Mera jahaan teri baahon mein khaab khaab hai 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Rang aashiqui 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Gehra hua 
Dariya dua 
Gehra hua

ūüé§ Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–Ķ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–Ķin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

ūüé§ Lyrics: Banjaare - Bairan

[Verse 1]
Ho, manne sambh-sambh rakhe tere jhanjhara ke jode
Meri gel ro-ro ye bhi chhori bawle se hore
Manne aaye jaave khyaal tere, khaye jaave khyaal tere
Jeen koni deti, haaye bairi tanhaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Instrumental]

[Verse 2]
Ho, maarya-maarya phire, dekh haal tu bichare ka
Tere bina jeena bhi ke jeena banjaar–Ķ ka?
Khoya rahun yaad teri kar ke nadaaniyaan
Batue m–Ķin rakhun teri sambh ke nishaaniyaan
Tere bina kaal horeya, theek konya haal mera
Haath jodun Ram, dede saanson te rihaayi manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Sambh-sambh rakhi bahut, chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne

[Bridge]
Haan-aan, aan-aan
Haan-aan

[Verse 3]
Je tu thodi ghabraajya, meri yaad tanne aa jya
Tu de diye awaaz re, main aa jaaunga
Todun duniya ki reet re, ke haar re, ke jeet?
Manne chahiye teri preet, main nibha jaaunga
Dekh, bawla banaagi, manne likhna sikhaagi
Haaye, noch-noch khaagi teri bairan judaai manne

[Chorus]
Geetaan mein gaayi, kade chhaati ke lagaayi manne
Jit bhi gaya re, teri yaad khadi paayi manne
Aaj tai nibhaun jo si kasam thi khaayi manne
Zindagi saari ya meri tere lekhe laayi manne

snippet.title: YABI - TIMI HO
snippet.description:
Written & performed by YABI THE G.O.A.T
Recorded at Kadak Nepali Records
Mixing & Mastering by Ruthlex
 
Get connected

YABI : https://www.instagram.com/yabi_the_g.o.a.t?igsh=MzE0anFmemF0bXV6&utm_source=qr

kADAK NEPALI RECORDS: https://www.instagram.com/kadaknepali?igsh=cDVoNW82NmIxbWY1

Ruthlex: https://www.instagram.com/ruthlexx_np?igsh=OHJ3djdvM3NmcHpz


‚ÄúTimi Ho‚ÄĚ  the 4th track from my mixtape Boomerang is finally here. This song is about real connection, loyalty, and the one person who becomes your strength when everything else feels uncertain. Sometimes in life, no matter how far things go, the right energy always comes back to you like a boomerang.
Thank you to everyone who keeps supporting the journey and believing in the music. This one is from the heart.

‚ÄúTimi Ho‚ÄĚ is now streaming on all platforms.

snippet.title: Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH
snippet.description:
Minecraft Speedrunner VS 6 Hunters REMATCH. You asked for it. This was absolutely INSANE.

Follow my socials:
‚ěĹ Twitter - @dream
‚ěĹ Instagram - @dreamwastaken
‚ěĹ Snapchat - @dreampublic

Merch: https://dream.shop

BadBoyHalo:  @thesaintsofgames 
George:  @GeorgeNotFound 
Sapnap:  @Sapnap 
Antfrost:  @Antfrost 
awesamdude:  @awesamdude 
CaptainPuffy:  @CaptainPuffy 

We decided to call this series Minecraft Manhunt. This video is a different rendition of it, where there are SIX hunters instead of THREE hunters or just one.

This is a new Minecraft but, 1.21.11 challenge that we have decided to try. I try to beat the game, while my friend George AND my friend Sapnap AND my friend BadBoyHalo AND my friend Antfrost AND my friend awesamdude AND my friend CaptainPuffy tries to prevent me from doing it. It's a race, and it's super intense and we had a lot of laughs. I love doing these challenges.

If this video gets 500,000 likes we'll do a rematch!

Not Minecraft, But Water Rises or Minecraft, But Lava Rises, or any other but challenge like that. This is a speed run / speed runner of Minecraft against a killer / assassin

#MinecraftManhunt

snippet.title: Destroying A World That Doesn't Exist
snippet.description:
A strange book appears in Avery's world warning him to run away, so he decides to investigate and hunt down the author - the missing player d3rlord3. But what he discovers inside his world is more than he could have ever imagined..

Avery's channel: @averylargemayo 

Voice of Avery: @andrewgaming677 
Voice of Abel/The Vessel: @Zeemyth 

ORIGINAL MUSIC BY: Ben Bracey (@benbraceymusic on instagram) 
https://soundcloud.com/benbraceymusic/sets/destroying-a-world-that-doesnt


DO NOT READ BELOW FOR SPOILERS:


d3rlord3's channel: @dhutchins333 


This is just a little part of the description where I talk about the video and there is a LOT to say about this guy. The reason this video is so long is because it was originally going to be two parts (a part 2 and a part 3) but the ending of part 2 was a little weak (end of Avery's pov) and I just felt part 3 would require way too much context. Soo we combined them into one.

I think I'm gonna post a full behind the scenes/deleted scenes video on my second channel @Twifies where I talk about how this video was made/why certain decisions were made. But something I really like are all the little headnods to some of my favorite pieces of fiction. Some more explicit, like in the library, but if you ever watched Adventure Time then those lines from the King should have sounded pretty familiar. 

This is easily the longest I've ever spent on a video and I never want it to happen again lol it feels unnatural to wait this long between uploads. I promise I'll be back to normal soon. This will either age well or it's not but this video feels pretty different from part 1 which gets me kind of scared. I think this video is lowkey not that scary, or at least it's not dense with scares and I might have lost the plot of what made part 1 good. But who knows. I think the ending slaps and the weakest scenes are (as always) the parts where you try and force fear. Aka mountain chase, and that chase after the floor disappears beneath Avery in the gray buildings. I just think you can't force fear and tension is where it shines. But who knows I've watched this video so many times I can't tell anymore. 

A note to the villain, I don't think of this as "The King in Yellow" perse, if anything it follows more from the Lovecraftian adaptation, Hastur. But I think this guy is my own adaptation of that adaptation. A King x Bill Cipher x The Lich if that makes any sense. 

Also if you want to support the project/download any of the builds then check them out here. You get every single world featured here + the world from part 1, all for $5:

BUILDS: https://horacecreations.com/products/dtl

I also want to say thank you to a few people bc without them this video would have been completely impossible. So a massive thank you to:
- Zeemyth for not only voicing but helping so much with writing the written books
- Horace and the entire team at HoraceCreations for being so good to work with and making this possible in the first place with their incredible building
- AndrewGaming67 for being so flexible and talented with the voice acting
- Wato and Kenadian for helping me with the more technical feats you've seen (ie boat phasing)
- Ben for the music and being so open to ideas and revisions
- Rekrap2 for sending me that shulker in the sky thing 4 years ago
- Parrot for all the advice and for motivating me to keep making better videos 
- Speedish for recording with me for hours and hours and sitting through my quality checks with me
- YOU for watching :) I really appreciate it 

‚ě§‚ě§ Twitter: https://twitter.com/WifiesWasTaken
‚ě§‚ě§ Discord: https://discord.gg/zAWUuWb


‚ě§‚ě§Links:

Tim Stephenson/The King: https://www.fiverr.com/tim_stephenson/record-a-deep-terrifying-cinematic-villain-voiceover-for-you

EPIDEMIC MUSIC I USE: https://www.youtube.com/redirect?event=video_description&redir_token=QUFFLUhqbldjZlI3Y2JVMm1FOURuaV9HRnI5bloxYWk2Z3xBQ3Jtc0tsNGctQ19SMGdrMURUUEE5VjBOdzV1QzYyYlIxeVRnR19RLTlfUGtWbF9GQmtFQVNCR2Vsam5pQWpuVDFiTTdzTWRzQkE3aktWUzd5TjBaOHpuUGtqVURwZXI3TFhtd0d2SWhlbVMtLXFTNTUyS3VHUQ&q=https%3A%2F%2Fshare.epidemicsound.com%2F1xis5q%2F%3Fplaylist%3Duad3vzakh605efvoqoi24llhnpr9lm2y&v=3V7Rvo4Gvic

ūüéĶ Copyrighted music licensed from Lickd. https://lickd.co

While My Guitar Gently Weeps (Live from Madison Square Garden, New York, U.S.A, 1971 / 2009 Remaster) by George Harrison, https://t.lickd.co/l/oOPdvzdZ73p

This is NOT series called Minecraft VVSauce where I explore random features of Minecraft. Not Secret Minecraft things or Minecraft lore (like Game Theory) or Escape Rooms, but a crazy super long unfiction video where Averythemayo and d3rlord3 search for the king in yellow? But not really the king in yellow. If anything it's more like hastur x the lich x bill cipher. Not even an arg but you can call it that. It's just video where stuff goes DOWN.

snippet.description:
I tried beating a Roblox obby while cursed and it was chaos! Make sure you watch the whole video to find out what happens.

Join this channel to get access to perks:
https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCRkuUgtDAL4XSU5jB40J_wA/join

--Socials--

Discord: https://discord.gg/hqwZhrkqRr

Roblox Group: https://www.roblox.com/groups/11775558/Foltyns-Family#!/about

Roblox Name: TheRealFoltyn

Insta: https://www.instagram.com/realfoltyn/

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

#Roblox #foltyn

Das Besondere an ROBLOX ist, dass praktisch alles von Mitgliedern der Community entworfen und gebaut wird. ROBLOX ist zwar f√ľr 13- bis 18-J√§hrige gedacht, steht aber allen Altersgruppen offen. Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Wat is Roblox? ROBLOX is een online virtuele speelplaats en werkplaats waar kinderen van alle leeftijden veilig met elkaar kunnen communiceren, cre√ęren, plezier hebben en leren. Het is uniek omdat vrijwel alles op ROBLOX is ontworpen en gebouwd door leden van de community. ROBLOX is ontworpen voor 13- tot 18-jarigen, maar is toegankelijk voor mensen van alle leeftijden. Elke speler begint met het kiezen van een avatar en het geven van een identiteit. Vervolgens kunnen ze ROBLOX verkennen en met anderen communiceren door te chatten, spelletjes te spelen of samen te werken aan creatieve projecten. Elke speler krijgt ook een eigen stuk onontwikkeld virtueel land, samen met een virtuele gereedschapskist waarmee ze van alles kunnen ontwerpen en bouwen ‚Äď of het nu een begaanbare wolkenkrabber, een werkende helikopter, een gigantische flipperkast, een multiplayer 'Capture the Flag'-spel of een andere, nog te bedenken creatie is. Dit eerste stuk virtuele land is gratis. Door deel te nemen en coole dingen te bouwen, kunnen ROBLOX-leden speciale badges en ROBLOX-dollars ('Robux') verdienen. Ze kunnen vervolgens in de online catalogus winkelen om kleding en accessoires voor hun avatar te kopen, evenals hoogwaardige bouwmaterialen, interactieve componenten en werkende mechanismen.

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

Apa itu Roblox? ROBLOX adalah taman bermain dan bengkel virtual online, tempat anak-anak dari segala usia dapat berinteraksi, berkreasi, bersenang-senang, dan belajar dengan aman. Keunikannya terletak pada kenyataan bahwa hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, permainan "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesoris avatar, serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

snippet.title: PUBGM 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II - FT. #4T #HORAA #ASI8 #SCYTES #LF #DRS #A1
snippet.description:
WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now.

WELCOME TO PUBG MOBILE 141 ULTIMATE GRIND CHAPTER II

One of the most exciting PUBG MOBILE competitive tournaments in South Asia returns with a new chapter. 

Top teams from Pakistan, Bangladesh, Nepal, Sri Lanka, and Mongolia enter the battlefield to compete in a high-intensity, multi day competition filled with strategy, rotations, and high-pressure fights.

Across multiple days of action, every match will test consistency, teamwork, and decision-making.
Every elimination matters. Every rotation counts. Every moment can change the leaderboard. 

Expect clutch plays, aggressive pushes, and top tier PUBG MOBILE gameplay as teams fight to prove themselves.

Only one team will rise above all and be crowned the Ultimate Grind Champion.

The grind begins now.

snippet.title: Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
snippet.description:
Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head) (Lyrics) ft. beabadoobee
Powfu - death bed (coffee for your head)ft. beabadoobee  
i'll make a cup of coffee for your head lyrics     

Stream:-  
https://Powfu.lnk.to/ListenID 



Follow Powfu: 
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followII
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followWI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followTI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followFI
https://Powfu.lnk.to/followWI



Lyrics:- 

[Intro: beabadoobee]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed


[Verse 1: Powfu]
Yeah, I don't wanna fall asleep, I don't wanna pass away
I been thinking of our future 'cause I'll never see those days
I don't know why this has happened, but I probably deserve it
I tried to do my best, but you know that I'm not perfect
I been praying for forgiveness, you've been praying for my health
When I leave this earth, hopin' you'll find someone else
'Cause yeah, we still young, there's so much we haven't done
Getting married, start a family, watch your husband with his son
I wish it could be me, but I won't make it out this bed
I hope I go to heaven so I see you once again
My life was kinda short, but I got so many blessings
Happy you were mine, it sucks that it's all ending


[Chorus: beabadoobee, Powfu, beabadoobee & Powfu]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Yeah, ayy)
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed (Ayy, yeah)


[Verse 2: Powfu]
I'm happy that you here with me, I'm sorry if I tear up
When me and you were younger, you would always make me cheer up
Taking goofy videos and walking through the park
You would jump into my arms every time you heard a bark
Cuddle in your sheets, sing me sound asleep
And sneak out through your kitchen at exactly 1:03
Sundays, went to church, on Mondays, watched a movie
Soon you'll be alone, sorry that you have to lose me


[Chorus: beabadoobee, Powfu, beabadoobee & Powfu]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed


[Outro: beabadoobee]
Don't stay awake for too long, don't go to bed
I'll make a cup of coffee for your head
It'll get you up and going out of bed





Tags:-

Twitter: https://twitter.com/Foltynnn

What is Roblox? ROBLOX is an online virtual playground and workshop, where kids of all ages can safely interact, create, have fun, and learn. It‚Äôs unique in that practically everything on ROBLOX is designed and constructed by members of the community. ROBLOX is designed for 13 to 18 year olds, but it is open to people of all ages. Each player starts by choosing an avatar and giving it an identity. They can then explore ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ interacting with others by chatting, playing games, or collaborating on creative projects. Each player is also given their own piece of undeveloped real estate along with a virtual toolbox with which to design and build anything ‚ÄĒ be it a navigable skyscraper, a working helicopter, a giant pinball machine, a multiplayer ‚ÄúCapture the Flag‚ÄĚ game or some other, yet-to-be-dreamed-up creation. There is no cost for this first plot of virtual land. By participating and by building cool stuff, ROBLOX members can earn specialty badges as well as ROBLOX dollars (‚ÄúRobux‚ÄĚ). In turn, they can shop the online catalog to purchase avatar clothing and accessories as well as premium building materials, interactive components, and working mechanisms.

Keunikannya terletak pada hampir semua hal di ROBLOX dirancang dan dibangun oleh anggota komunitas. ROBLOX dirancang untuk usia 13 hingga 18 tahun, tetapi terbuka untuk semua usia. Setiap pemain memulai dengan memilih avatar dan memberinya identitas. Mereka kemudian dapat menjelajahi ROBLOX ‚ÄĒ berinteraksi dengan orang lain melalui obrolan, bermain game, atau berkolaborasi dalam proyek kreatif. Setiap pemain juga diberikan sebidang lahan virtual yang belum dikembangkan beserta kotak peralatan virtual untuk mendesain dan membangun apa pun ‚ÄĒ baik itu gedung pencakar langit yang dapat dijelajahi, helikopter yang berfungsi, mesin pinball raksasa, game "Capture the Flag" multipemain, atau kreasi lain yang belum terbayangkan. Tidak ada biaya untuk lahan virtual pertama ini. Dengan berpartisipasi dan membangun hal-hal keren, anggota ROBLOX dapat memperoleh lencana khusus serta mata uang ROBLOX ("Robux"). Sebagai gantinya, mereka dapat berbelanja di katalog online untuk membeli pakaian dan aksesori avatar serta bahan bangunan premium, komponen interaktif, dan mekanisme yang berfungsi.

"I Like Me Better"

To be young and in love in New York City

Cause it gets so hard to breathe
When you're looking at me
I've never felt so alive and free

I've never felt so happy

And I'm pretty sure that you are that love of mine

Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Bridge]
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know?
Dandelion into the wind you go
Won't you let my darling know that

[Chorus]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine
And I see forever in your eyes
I feel okay when I see you smile, smile

[Post-Chorus]
Wishing on dandelions all of the time
Praying to God that one day you'll be mine
Wishing on dandelions all of the time, all of the time

[Outro]
I'm in a field of dandelions
Wishing on every one that you'd be mine, mine

snippet.title: Ganga Ke Kinare | Bunny | Sagar | Kripa Record
snippet.description:
Kripa Record Presents "Ganga Ke Kinare"

Singer - Bunny & Sagar
Music & Compose - Bunny 
Lyrics - Sagar 
Flute - Kiran Vinkar
Mix & Master - Hanish Taneja

Featuring - Dimpy Negi
Director - Alex
Creative Director & DOP - Arshad
Editor - Zipsi
Colourist - Onkar
VFX - Ronak Bindra and Aman Singh bhakuni 
BTS - Shubham rana 
Camera Assitant - Golu
Sagar & Bunny Makeup & Hair - Viren 
Dimpy makeup & Hair - Sonakshi & Isha 
Choreographer - Chinu
Foreigners Coordinator - Chinu & Vijay Rawat
Dimpy Costume - Nandini Fashion ( Lehnga )
Camera & Light- Y-Series Production Lights 
Gaffer - Sunil 
Drone - Shanky 

Special thanks - Parmarth Niketan Ashram

Team Kripa Record - Ankita

Digital Distribution - Universal Music
Project Head - Sahil Sharma 

Lyrics: 

Chaand ko niharu
Shiv Jo pukaru x2
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke‚Ä¶
Ganga ke kinaare 
baith ke 

Rooh ko sawaru 
Aarti utaaru
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke x2
Baith ke‚Ä¶. 

Hum toh hmare hi jeevan se hai itne 
Sataaye hue 
Toote hain bikhre hain hum toh 
Sabke bhulaye hue 

Kehte hain aaye jo 
Ganga nahaye 
Har jaate hain sab log 
Ab humne samjha hai 
Ab humne jana 
Kyu ganga aate hain log 

Thakk gaye the hum 
Dukhon ko utha ke 
Ab chain ayaaa 
Aayi ab saansain
Ganga ke kinaare baith ke 
Baith ke ‚Ä¶. X2 

Kyu roye har baat me bandeya 
Kya laya tha sath me bandeya 
Jaane de jo chala gaya hai 
Kuch bi nai tere hath me bandeya  

Man nahi bharta 
Jitna bi taakain
Itna sukoon hain 
Bhar gayi aankhain
Ganga ke kinaare bath ke‚Ä¶
 
Ganga dharaye shivaye Ganga dharaye 
Har har bole namah shivaye..

Reach us at: Kriparecordsindia@gmail.com

(c) Universal Music Group

‚Ėļ About Kripa Record:

"Kripa Record" is a devotional music label dedicated to producing and promoting spiritual music that inspires profound experiences. "Kripa" meaning "grace" in Sanskrit, reflects the essence of divine mercy in the label's music. Kripa‚Äôs diverse devotional music is crafted by renowned artists, invoking peace, reverence, and spiritual awakening. It will serve as a cherished companion for meditation, prayer, and reflection.

snippet.title: Dil Aaya - Aviverse | ‚Ä™‚Ä™ @astheticavi  |‚Ä™‚Ä™ @MeAbhishekShukla   (Official Music Video)
snippet.description:
STREAM All Songs Of  Aviverse : https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

"Dil Aaya" is a romantic song about the powerful feeling of falling in love just by looking into someone‚Äôs beautiful eyes. Sometimes a single glance is enough to steal a heart, and this song captures that exact emotion.

The song expresses the attraction, the charm of kajal-filled eyes, and the moment when someone becomes so special that the heart begins to dream of a future together. It is about love, admiration, and the promise of holding hands and walking through life together.

Audio Credits:

Song Name : Dil Aaya
Vocals : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Lyrics : Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Composed by : Avinash Kumar & Abhishek Shukla
Music Producer : Abs

Video Credits:
 
Cast:  Tanvi Duggal , Janhavi Joshi , Abhishek Shukla & Avinash Kumar
Director: Joseph B. 
Producer: Avinash Kumar
Cinematographer : Vasu Menon 
Assistant Cinematographer : Archit
Line Producer: Shravan
Editor: Ajmal Rasali
Colorist: Ajmal Rasali
Poster & Thumbnail Designer: Junaid & Shreyas


Stream On Aviverse Spotify - https://open.spotify.com/artist/0HTZXytA3dhUpgTADrDn9O?si=CMRqfcHkRy-qTAWA4WGEqw

Aviverse's Instagram -      / aviversemusic    
Abhishek's Instagram -       / abhishekxavi    
Avinash's Instagram -         / aesthetic_avii    

Lyrics  :  

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Haath pakad ke sang chal de tu

O mere Maahi, gall sunn le tu
Kinni soni hai, mainu lagti tu

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

Jaati hai tham ab saansein meri
Jab aati tu paas mere

Ghayal karta hai tera woh kajal mujhe
Jab takti ye akhiyan tujhe

Dulhan banaunga, tujhko sajaunga
Mehndi laga ke rakhna, doli mein launga

Jo na maane ye duniya, toh ladd bhi jaunga
Haathon ko thaam le, main waada nibhaunga

Haaaa Dil Aaya (Dil Aaya)
Dil aaya, mera teri aankhon pe

Haaaa Qatilana (Qatilana)
Darr lagta mujhko teri aankhon se

(c) Aviverse 2026
